title: Exercises: Scaling Challenges
description: Practice scaling analysis for trapped ion systems

exercises.title: Mode Spacing Analysis
exercises.description: Calculate how motional mode spacing decreases with increasing ion number.
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np

def mode_spacing(N_ions: int, omega_z_MHz: float) -> float:
    """Estimate minimum mode spacing for N ions.
    
    For large N, mode spacing decreases as ~omega_z / N
    """
    return omega_z_MHz / N_ions

# Plot mode spacing vs N
for N in [2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100]:
    spacing = mode_spacing(N, 1.0)
    print(f"N = {N}: spacing ~ {spacing*1000:.0f} kHz")
hints: Compare to laser linewidth for resolvability
